ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS)-SC-108A THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: [X] JUDGMENT (INCLUDING PRINCIPAL AND COSTS) IS $3850.00, AS DEFENDANT IS NOT ENTITLED TO A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2552.00. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT DIXON, AHSLEY CARLTON LEE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT KOH, SUSAN S. $6,945.67 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,095.67, 1) DEFENDANT ANDREW MICHELSON IS DISMISSED BY AGREEMENT OF ASHLEY DIXON UNDER APPLICATION OF RESPONDENT SUPERIOR/AGENCY. 2) ASHLEY DIXON IS DIRECTED TO RECOVER A TOTAL OF $7095.67, EITHER THROUGH USE OF EXISTING DEFENDANT KOH'S CHECK #1218 FOR $2552.00 AS A CREDIT, OR BY SINGLE JUDGMENT. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JUNE 3, 2013 AS CORRECTED ON AUGUST 27, 2013. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge pro tem Jason Jungreis, clerk Jean Kong, nothing reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. appellant's attorney Gregory S. Weston appears for Susan S. Koh, no appearance by Andrew Michelson; respondent, Ahsley Carlton Lee Dixon appears as pro per with Jerome Sanders - witness/supporter/partner. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jungreis.

EXHR (B) PICTURES OF CARPET
